name: self-heal-stale-obsidian-kb
title: Self-heal stale generated Obsidian KB during full-check
description: Make the default full-check KB lane refresh and recheck an existing stale generated Obsidian KB while preserving strict required-mode failures and absent-KB opt-in behavior.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Origin: GitHub issue #204, reported by the anomaly-metric-creator performance audit.
